opspal-core.name: plugin-scaffolding
opspal-core.description: Templates for creating Claude Code plugin components. Use when creating new agents, hooks, commands, or scripts. Provides standardized file structures and required fields for consistent plugin development.

opspal-core.name: asana-integration-playbook
opspal-core.description: Asana project management integration patterns and best practices. Use when creating Asana tasks, posting updates, reading task context, tracking project progress, or formatting task updates. Provides 40+ Asana API patterns, error handling, update templates, and brevity standards.

opspal-core.name: file-catalog-patterns
opspal-core.description: Standard patterns for file catalog generation across source platforms (Monday.com, Airtable, Notion, etc.) for CRM ingestion. Use when transforming file exports into normalized catalogs, matching downloaded assets to source records, preparing file inventories for Salesforce/HubSpot import, or building cross-platform file migration workflows. Provides schema standards, matching strategies, and integration patterns.

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-deps
developer-tools-plugin.description: Analyze plugin dependencies, detect conflicts, check version compatibility, and generate dependency graphs

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-release
developer-tools-plugin.description: Release Plugin Version with Slack Notification

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-publish
developer-tools-plugin.description: Manage plugin versioning, git tagging, and marketplace publishing

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-validate
developer-tools-plugin.description: Validate plugin structure, naming, manifests, and quality standards

developer-tools-plugin.name: agent-quality
developer-tools-plugin.description: Analyze agent quality with scoring across prompt engineering, tools, and docs

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-catalog
developer-tools-plugin.description: Generate comprehensive marketplace catalog with plugin and agent directories

developer-tools-plugin.name: otel-grafana
developer-tools-plugin.description: Set up and manage Grafana dashboard for Claude Code metrics

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-test
developer-tools-plugin.description: Run comprehensive integration tests for plugin installation and functionality

developer-tools-plugin.name: otel-analyze
developer-tools-plugin.description: Analyze OpenTelemetry metrics and generate insights

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-generate-tests
developer-tools-plugin.description: Generate comprehensive test suites for plugins with auto-detection of testable functions and Jest scaffolding

developer-tools-plugin.name: plugin-scaffold
developer-tools-plugin.description: Create a new plugin with proper structure, manifests, and boilerplate code

ai-consult-plugin.name: gemini-link
ai-consult-plugin.description: Set up and verify Gemini CLI connection for cross-model consultation

ai-consult-plugin.name: gemini-consult
ai-consult-plugin.description: Get a second opinion from Gemini on code, architecture, or decisions

gtm-planning-plugin.name: quota-capacity-modeling
gtm-planning-plugin.description: Quota and capacity modeling methodology with Monte Carlo simulations and P10/P50/P90 scenarios. Use when building quota models, running scenario analysis, calculating pipeline coverage, performing sensitivity analysis, back-testing against historical data, or validating hiring plans.

gtm-planning-plugin.name: gtm-annual-planning-framework
gtm-planning-plugin.description: GTM annual planning orchestration methodology with 7-phase workflow and approval gates. Use when initiating annual planning cycles, coordinating planning workstreams, managing approval checkpoints, executing multi-agent planning workflows, or packaging final GTM deliverables.
